Title: SENATE BILL NO. 608
Official Title: SENATE BILL NO. 608
Number of Sections: 7
Source: versions - Substitute (S-1) - 2
Media Type: application/pdf
Strikethrough Detection: 2 sections found

================================================================================

Section 1:
SUBSTITUTE FOR
A bill to amend 2020 PA 220, entitled
"Industrial hemp growers act,"
by repealing sections 101, 103, 105, 201, 211, 213, 215, 217, 301,
303, 305, 307, 309, 311, 313, 401, 403, 405, 407, 409, 501, 503,
505, 507, 509, 511, 513, 515, 601, 602, 603, 605, 607, 609, and 801
(MCL 333.29101, 333.29103, 333.29105, 333.29201, 333.29211,

Section 2:
333.29213, 333.29215, 333.29217, 333.29301, 333.29303, 333.29305,

Section 3:
333.29307, 333.29309, 333.29311, 333.29313, 333.29401, 333.29403,

Section 4:
333.29405, 333.29407, 333.29409, 333.29501, 333.29503, 333.29505,

Section 5:
333.29507, 333.29509, 333.29511, 333.29513, 333.29515, 333.29601,

Section 6:
333.29602, 333.29603, 333.29605, 333.29607, 333.29609, and

Section 7:
333.29801).
THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF MICHIGAN ENACT:
RMH S04639'25 (S-1) s3kpnw
2
1 Enacting section 1. Sections 101, 103, 105, 201, 211, 213,
2 215, 217, 301, 303, 305, 307, 309, 311, 313, 401, 403, 405, 407,
3 409, 501, 503, 505, 507, 509, 511, 513, 515, 601, 602, 603, 605,
4 607, 609, and 801 of the industrial hemp growers act, 2020 PA 220,
5 MCL 333.29101, 333.29103, 333.29105, 333.29201, 333.29211,
6 333.29213, 333.29215, 333.29217, 333.29301, 333.29303, 333.29305,
7 333.29307, 333.29309, 333.29311, 333.29313, 333.29401, 333.29403,
8 333.29405, 333.29407, 333.29409, 333.29501, 333.29503, 333.29505,
9 333.29507, 333.29509, 333.29511, 333.29513, 333.29515, 333.29601,
10 333.29602, 333.29603, 333.29605, 333.29607, 333.29609, and
11 333.29801, are repealed.
12 Enacting section 2. This amendatory act takes effect February
13 1, 2027.
Final Page
RMH S04639'25 (S-1) s3kpnw
[DELETED:   S s]
[DELETED:   S s E 2 4 6 M 3 3 3 3 3 3 E 1]


================================================================================

Raw Text:
SUBSTITUTE FOR
SENATE BILL NO. 608
A bill to amend 2020 PA 220, entitled
"Industrial hemp growers act,"
by repealing sections 101, 103, 105, 201, 211, 213, 215, 217, 301,
303, 305, 307, 309, 311, 313, 401, 403, 405, 407, 409, 501, 503,
505, 507, 509, 511, 513, 515, 601, 602, 603, 605, 607, 609, and 801
(MCL 333.29101, 333.29103, 333.29105, 333.29201, 333.29211,
333.29213, 333.29215, 333.29217, 333.29301, 333.29303, 333.29305,
333.29307, 333.29309, 333.29311, 333.29313, 333.29401, 333.29403,
333.29405, 333.29407, 333.29409, 333.29501, 333.29503, 333.29505,
333.29507, 333.29509, 333.29511, 333.29513, 333.29515, 333.29601,
333.29602, 333.29603, 333.29605, 333.29607, 333.29609, and
333.29801).
THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF MICHIGAN ENACT:
RMH S04639'25 (S-1) s3kpnw

2
1 Enacting section 1. Sections 101, 103, 105, 201, 211, 213,
2 215, 217, 301, 303, 305, 307, 309, 311, 313, 401, 403, 405, 407,
3 409, 501, 503, 505, 507, 509, 511, 513, 515, 601, 602, 603, 605,
4 607, 609, and 801 of the industrial hemp growers act, 2020 PA 220,
5 MCL 333.29101, 333.29103, 333.29105, 333.29201, 333.29211,
6 333.29213, 333.29215, 333.29217, 333.29301, 333.29303, 333.29305,
7 333.29307, 333.29309, 333.29311, 333.29313, 333.29401, 333.29403,
8 333.29405, 333.29407, 333.29409, 333.29501, 333.29503, 333.29505,
9 333.29507, 333.29509, 333.29511, 333.29513, 333.29515, 333.29601,
10 333.29602, 333.29603, 333.29605, 333.29607, 333.29609, and
11 333.29801, are repealed.
12 Enacting section 2. This amendatory act takes effect February
13 1, 2027.
Final Page
RMH S04639'25 (S-1) s3kpnw

[DELETED:   S s]
[DELETED:   S s E 2 4 6 M 3 3 3 3 3 3 E 1]
